title: Strings and non-strings should not be added
description: Strings and non-strings should not be addedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellconfusingtype-dependentWhy is this an issue?Use a+with two numbers and you’ll get addition. But use it with a string and anything else, and you’ll get concatenation. This could be confusing, especially if it’s not obvious that one of the operands is a string.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Mixing strings with non-strings using + can cause confusing concatenation. Use template literals or explicit conversion.
Mixing non-strings with strings using + can cause confusing concatenation. Use template literals or explicit conversion.
Variable mixed with string literal using + may cause unexpected concatenation. Consider using template literals.
